<p>Erling Haaland scored a late winner as Norway set up a last-16 showdown with Brazil at the World Cup after taming the Ivory Coast 2-1 in Texas on Tuesday.</p>

news.headline: Tens of millions swelter as heat wave blasts US
news.summary:
<p>Tens of millions of Americans sweltered under furnace-like temperatures Tuesday as central and eastern cities hunkered down for a heat wave set to last through the July 4 holiday weekend.</p>

news.headline: Manhunt launched after Monaco blast targets Ukrainian-born oligarch
news.summary: Police in Monaco and France were searching for a suspected bomber on Tuesday after three people were wounded by an explosion in the wealthy principality which two sources said ​was an attack ‌on a Ukrainian-born oligarch. news.headline: 14 children dead in Lahore tuition centre roof collapse: police
news.summary:
<p>LAHORE: As many as 14 children lost their lives on Tuesday, while several others were injured, when the roof of a private tuition centre collapsed in Lahore’s Kahna area, officials said.</p>
